---
title: "A Framework for Designing Model-Structured Neural Networks for Modeling, Control, and Estimation of Physical Systems"
author:
  - "Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini"
publication: "University of Trento, Italy (2025)"
type: presentation
categories:
  - "Presentations"
  - "Model-Structured Neural Networks"
url_source: 
url_preprint: 
journ: "University of Trento, Italy"
venue: "Workshop-COSENO, University of Trento, Italy"
year: 2025
doi: ""
pdf: presentation.pdf
pub_number: 29
order: -29
image: slide.png
---

## Summary

Presentation by **Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini** at the **Workshop-COSENO, University of Trento, Italy** (2025). The talk *A Framework for Designing Model-Structured Neural Networks for Modeling, Control, and Estimation of Physical Systems* reviews limitations of standard MLPs, introduces model-structured learning, describes the **nnodely** tool chain, and presents use cases on autonomous mechanical and mechatronic systems.

::: {.presentation-preview}
![](slide.png){fig-alt="First slide: Framework for MSNN modeling, control and estimation" width=95%}
:::
